name: Alpha Case Sizing Lube
description:
-Alpha Case Lube is our proprietary formulation, and the exact product used in our manufacturing process. This lube is specifically designed for forming brass making it ideal for home reloading.
-Use sparingly by applying a light film to brass cases prior to resizing
-Can be applied by hand or using a lube pad
-Water soluble. Wipes away easily without using solvent
-2 oz

name: Alpha Legacy Muzzle Crown Tool – 11 Degree
description: The muzzle crown, the last point of contact between the rifle barrel and the bullet, is critical for accuracy. A precisely cut, concentric crown ensures a uniform bullet exit, minimizing disruptions that could cause inaccuracies. Imperfections in the crown can lead to erratic bullet behavior and inconsistent shot placement. Alpha Munitions’ Legacy muzzle crowning tool, with its advanced design, proprietary stealth coating, and unmatched precision, delivers a perfect muzzle crown every time.

name: Alpha Legacy Predrill – Carbide
description:
Alpha Munitions’ Legacy drill is designed for pre-drilling chambers before using rougher reamers or chamber reamers, ensuring a precise starting point for chambering. Made from solid carbide, the drill is significantly stiffer than steel, reducing deflection during drilling for enhanced accuracy and consistency. Its precision-engineered drill geometry optimizes cutting efficiency and maintains tight tolerances, critical for high-performance rifle chambers. The Legacy drill’s robust construction and design make it an essential tool for gunsmiths aiming for superior chamber alignment and finish.
0.31″ x 3.75″ Drill is for use with .223/5.56 diameter/length cases.  Flute length is 2.25″ and shank diameter is .4375″ and shank length is 1.5″
0.36″ x 3.50″ Drill is for use with ARC/Grendel diameter/length cases.  Flute length is 2.00″ and shank diameter is .4375″ and shank length is 1.5″
0.41″ x 3.50″ Drill is for use with BR/Dasher/GT diameter/length cases. Flute length is 2.00″ and shank diameter is .4375″ and shank length is 1.5″
0.41″ x 4.25″ Drill is for use with .308/Creedmoor/-06/280 diameter/length cases.  Flute length is 2.75″ and shank diameter is .4375″ and shank length is 1.5″
0.47″ x 4.25″ Drill is for use with PRC/WSM/SAUM/28 Nosler diameter/length cases. Flute length is 2.75″ and shank diameter is .50″ and shank length is 1.5″
0.50″ x 4.25″ Drill is for use with Norma Mag/Lapua Mag diameter/length cases. Flute length is 2.75″ and shank diameter is .50″ and shank length is 1.5″

name: Alpha Legacy Reamer
description:
Reamers are carbide.
Backorder Lead Time is 4-8 Weeks.
Reamers use pilot bushings for standard tool steel reamers.  Pilot Bushings are not included.
Performance
Legacy reamers are the most consistent reamers available.  All key dimensions on our reamers are guaranteed to be within 4 microns or 0.0001574803” with a majority falling within 2 microns or 0.0000787402”.   This means the reamer you purchase today will be virtually identical to the reamer you purchase in the future, helping to minimize inconsistencies and variabilities in the chambering process.
Stealth Coating Technology
Our proprietary stealth coating technology improves edge retention and incorporates a post coating process to further reduce the coefficient of friction and increase chip flow.
C-Clips are included with your order but also available at McMaster-Carr
22/6mm Clip is McMaster PN 97414A615
6.5/25cal clip is McMaster PN 97431A240
7mm Clip is McMaster PN 97414A620
30Cal Clip is McMaster PN 97414A625

name: Alpha Legacy Roughers – Carbide
description: Alpha Legacy Rougher reamers are held to the same tight tolerances as our finish reamers.  The roughers are designed with 3 flutes and chip breakers.

name: Micron Precision Series – Neck Sizing Bushings
Micron Precision Series – Sizer Die
description:
The Micron Precision Die Series features:

Custom-sized die bodies for each caliber. We do not believe in a one-size-fits-all approach; This allows for the sizing of the entire neck if desired. 
Our CNC machinery and processes allow for the highest level of straightness and precision in the industry.
Our brand new Die-Loc lock-ring system allows for perfectly perpendicular alignment with the top of the press and voids misalignment often found with other locking ring systems.
After all the CNC processes, every Micron Precision Die is finished by hand, inspected, and sent out for Nitride QPQ hardening. Once hardened, the dies are individually polished and checked again before being ready for sale.

In conclusion, these dies have been proven by the world’s best rifle competitors. From Benchrest to Barricades, your investment in a Micron Precision Die will give you the peace of mind that your brass is being cared for after each firing. One of the single most essential items in your reloading setup is your sizing die. The Micron Precision Series Sizer Die should be your number one choice!
